title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
description: Led the migration of legacy Express.js services to a modular microservices architecture. Designed and implemented real-time data visualization dashboards using React and WebSockets, improving client data transparency by 30%. Developed RESTful APIs and optimized database queries for high-performance systems. Mentored junior developers and contributed to code reviews to ensure best practices.

title: Junior Developer
description: Developed and maintained client websites using Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Built custom CMS plugins and integrated third-party APIs for payment processing (Stripe) and shipping logistics. Collaborated with designers and senior developers to deliver high-quality, responsive web applications. Gained experience in debugging and optimizing front-end performance.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: Took on a leadership role, balancing technical and managerial responsibilities. Designed scalable software architectures for cloud-native applications, integrating IoT devices with AI-powered analytics. Acted as a consultant for clients, providing technical guidance and ensuring alignment with business goals. Led pre-sales efforts by creating technical proposals and presenting solutions to stakeholders. Managed a team of developers, overseeing project timelines, code quality, and team productivity. Championed the adoption of modern development practices, including CI/CD pipelines and automated testing.
